items.title: If we win the World Cup again, then Thomas Tuchel will be my favourite German, says England’s 1966 hero Sir Geoff Hurst
items.summary: ENGLAND’S sole surviving World Cup winner Sir Geoff Hurst says manager Thomas Tuchel would be his favourite German — if the Three Lions lift the trophy.
